name: logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/week tool
description: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/week, inefficient route planning causes increased operational costs. We generate weekly logistics route efficiency reports from GPS data instead of manual route planning and analysis.
problem_solved: Inefficient route planning leads to increased operational costs.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient route planning leads to increased operational costs.
